title: Anyswap - REKT
relevance_summary: ECDSA signature vulnerability in AnySwap V3 Router leading to private key compromise and stablecoin theft

prevention.rule: Block any tx that uses ECDSA for signature generation without ensuring unique k values per signature
prevention.trigger: ECDSA signature generation with repeated k values

red_flags: Repeated k values in ECDSA signatures
Private key back-calculated from repeated k values
monitoring_rules: Block any tx using ECDSA with repeated k values
summary: Anyswap V3 Router exploited due to repeated k values in ECDSA signatures, leading to private key compromise and stablecoin theft. A guard could have blocked such transactions by monitoring for repeated k values in ECDSA signatures.
